title: Expedia Car Rental Scraper
description: Extract Expedia car rental offers from carsearch pages with vehicle, pricing, and offer token details.

startUrl.title: Expedia carsearch URL
startUrl.description: Full Expedia car rental search URL. The actor reads pickup, drop-off, date, and time from this URL and gives it highest priority.

results_wanted.title: Maximum offers
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of car offers to save.

max_pages.title: Maximum pages
max_pages.description: Maximum API page requests to perform.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use residential proxy for stable cloud runs.
